About the Villa

Your Private Himalayan Sanctuary

Nestled in the serene hills of Kasauli, Jolly Villa offers a perfect blend of luxury, privacy, and breathtaking mountain views — just 55 km from Chandigarh. Wake up to crisp Himalayan air, unwind amidst lush greenery, and experience the calm of a secluded hillside retreat.

The villa's centrepiece is its inviting swimming pool, perched to command sweeping valley views. Whether you're planning a family gathering, a friends' weekend escape, or a peaceful staycation, Jolly Villa delivers modern comforts, warm hospitality, and nature's tranquility in equal measure.

Check-in 1:00 PM
